items.claim: Topic-Aware Compaction is marked HOLD with target venue COLM 2026 and primary metric token savings.
Contract-Driven Agent Harness Engineering is marked NEXT with primary venue ACL 2026 Findings and primary metric cross-model gap compression.
If the benchmark evidence remains partial, Contract-Driven Agent Harness Engineering should use COLM systems workshop as fallback venue.
The immediate blocker for Contract-Driven Agent Harness Engineering is proving a nonzero baseline model gap before running the full benchmark.
LLMLingua is a comparator family, not a proposal to route.
